retained_issues.description: Batch03 has 28 requirement IDs not found in p0_gri_requirement_checklist.json, typically dot-level IDs such as current_gap:GRI303:303-3:a.iii; batch05 has 2 parent disclosure IDs used as requirement references.
retained_issues.required_action: Normalize or map requirement IDs to checklist IDs before final evaluation, or document a manual waiver.

retained_issues.description: Most supporting_evidence_ids bind chunk_id while some bind evidence_id. Current validators allow this, but the strict final audit design expects evidence[].evidence_id binding.
retained_issues.required_action: Choose and enforce one binding rule, preferably evidence_id for final audit artifacts, or document a manual waiver.

retained_issues.description: Among 159 substantive report evidence snippets, PyPDF2 matched 28 and did not match 131. Causes include PDF table/layout extraction limitations and possible non-verbatim snippet risk.
retained_issues.required_action: Repair PDF evidence location checks with stronger extraction/rendering or add human waiver notes before final statistics.

retained_issues.description: Batch01, batch03 and batch04 advisor outputs were generated before corrected assessments and cannot be used for final recommendations. Batch05 has advisor_result_corrected.json and raw advisor is superseded.
retained_issues.required_action: Regenerate Advisor outputs from effective corrected artifacts, or generate one final Advisor result from the consolidated effective assessment set.

next_actions.condition: E3.5 may rely on the 114 ordinary current_gap coverage and current assessment statistics only.
